pi_items.source: setup_task.sh copies the source file to TASK_ORK=/home/ga/Documents/rockets/hollow_airframe.ork and modifies it
There is no verifier.py present for this task, so no programmatic threshold check is enforced.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on the non-synthetic 'A simple model rocket' design by Sampo Niskanen, which is included as an example in OpenRocket. The setup script copies simple_model_rocket.ork to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/hollow_airframe.ork and intentionally strips all internal components (innertube, engineblock, centeringring) and fin tabs via a Python zipfile/XML manipulation script. The agent must save the upgraded design to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/fin_can_upgrade.ork and write a report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/fin_can_report.txt, which are explicitly checked by export_result.sh. However, the task is missing its verifier.py file, so specific structural evaluation criteria and the pass_threshold of 70 cannot be enforced programmatically.
